But Nizam was tricked by his sister Nana to take a loan on her behalf and he is forced to sell his current apartment to pay for the loan.

programme.desc: The heirloom cuisine of Korea’s traditional clan families carries generations of wisdom rooted in harmony with nature. programme.title: Cheers Brother - Cheers Brother Episode 1
programme.desc: Dong-il and Chang-seok visit a traditional Korean liquor brewery in Seongsu-dong, Seoul. As they explore the process of how makgeolli is made, they taste freshly brewed raw liquor. Heading to a nearby market, they meet a guest, shop for anju ingredients, and prepare dishes perfectly paired with traditional alcohol.

programme.desc: Gisele and her Green Team fight Nick Slick from illegally running a detergent factory in Australia.

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers S2 - Spooky Costume Party / GMO OMG - EP213
programme.desc: The gang helps Patty with an eco-friendly spooky costume party; Preston's genetically modified crops are going crazy.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Electri-Kent / Fashion Genes - EP106
programme.desc: Kent discovers one of Edison’s secret inventions – an exo-bodysuit: a steampunk Ironman device that turns him into a klutzy superhero. / Ever-confident Nicky finds herself competing with Sheila in a “Project Runway”-type show, and, needing the perfect model to show off her designs on the runway, she decides to clone herself.

programme.title: Secret Millionaires Club - A Midwestern Yankee In King Arthur's Court, Pt. 3 - EP114
programme.desc: The SMC kids race to find the final Two Golden Rules, save Guinevere and recover the Book of Spells in time to return home.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten - Superhero Kindergarten: The First Day of School - EP101
programme.desc: Arnold Armstrong, formerly the superhero Captain Fantastic, faces an unexpected career change after losing his superpowers in a final epic showdown with Dr. Superior; he’s now tasked with guiding a special group of 6 kids through superhero training and the challenges of kindergarten.

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock’ Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it’s not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.title: Misha, the Purple Cat
programme.desc: Misha is a very lively, alert cat. She is very interested in investigating everything going on around her, which means she has some very entertaining adventures with her friends. Many things can happen in Misha’s world; especially exciting adventures, mysterious investigations, hilarious competitions... all with a feeling of close friendship.

programme.title: Music Box
programme.desc: Get ready to dance and sing-along to music-filled episodes

programme.title: LOL Block
programme.desc: A crazy collection of hilarious comedy series featuring shows like, Jelly Jam, Crazy Candies, Karim & Noor, and Talking Tom.

programme.title: Baby Riki
programme.desc: The show covers all aspects of a child’s life from physical well-being to cognitive and soft skills. The musical stories are based around age-appropriate experiences with educational concepts introduced in familiar surroundings and context for infants.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends Minis
programme.desc: Get ready to watch Talking Tom and Friends at their cutest! Mini in size, but massive in fun, the Minis check out the day-to-day world of the friends we all know and love where they do the most ordinary things in the most extraordinary ways.

programme.title: Leo the Wildlife Ranger
programme.desc: Leo the Wildlife Ranger introduces the secrets and wonders of nature and wildlife around us and kickstarts a curiosity and passion for nature in kids. With engaging missions and adventures, kids have fun while learning positive lessons!

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: The show features Paula and her friends, Tim, Billy, Chalky, Calc, and the Numbers as they go on exciting adventures in colorful and exotic places. From the Amazon jungles to the deepest oceans, and to the hottest deserts, Paula and friends solve problems, have fun and make more friends along the way!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

Bino and Fino have many adventures where, with the help of their friend Zeena the Magic Butterfly, they discover and learn things about the world.

programme.title: Horaci the Inuit
programme.desc: Packed with adventure, fun and excitement, HORACI THE INUIT will transport you to the Lands of the North where, together with his best friend Sedna, he will have to solve all kinds of mysteries! programme.title: The Apple of My Eye
programme.desc: Elise is beautiful, funny, and blind. Theo is a seducer but a loser. They love music. But when they meet in the elevator, it's hate at first sight.

programme.title: Running On Sand
programme.desc: When an Eritrean refugee about to be deported from Israel is mistaken for the Nigerian striker just signed to a struggling soccer team, his fate depends on the team’s success in this charming, socially relevant dramedy.

programme.title: Baltic Files I - The Body On The Beach
programme.desc: After being transferred to the German-Danish border, Chief Inspector Svenja is tasked with a case involving a body on a beach. With her new colleague Antione, she investigates a case which involves a liquor dealer and a tragedy that goes back decades.

programme.title: Black Snow
programme.desc: Gosha is a trucker in northern Yakutia, who supplies his community with food, alongside low quality vodka which contributes to their alcoholism. When his truck breaks down during one of his trips, he finds himself alone in the wilderness.

programme.title: Good Luck Sam
programme.desc: Sam and Stéphane, childhood friends and ski equipment designers, embark on a wild quest to save their struggling business. They hatch a plan to enter Sam into the Winter Olympics, and have him compete under his father’s home country of Algeria.

programme.title: Our Children
programme.desc: A doctor brings a boy to Belgium and raises him as his own. When the boy reaches manhood, he gets married and starts his own family, but he still relies on the doctor, his adoptive father. When trouble strikes his family, dependence turns into domination.

programme.title: Romancing The Jungle
programme.desc: Eva is a rookie journalist keen on investigating sea piracy. When she is really kidnapped by pirates in Thailand, she is forced to fight for her life. With her is a hunky smuggler called Nik, and together, the comedic duo band together to survive.

programme.title: Forever-Forever
programme.desc: In late 90s Kyiv, rebellious Tonia joins a gang, seeking protection and belonging. Amidst the ruins of the post-soviet city, she finds herself tangled up in a secret love triangle and confronting her abusive past.

programme.title: Life Feels Good
programme.desc: The true story of Mateusz, a man suffering from cerebral palsy, who in his early childhood had been diagnosed as a retard with no contact with the outside world. After twenty-five years it turned out that he was a perfectly normal and intelligent person.

programme.title: Traces Of Sandalwood
programme.desc: Adopted and living in Spain for years, a young woman returns to Mumbai to discover her roots, accompanied by a handsome Indian guide whom she romances.

programme.title: The Apple of My Eye
programme.desc: Elise is beautiful, funny, and blind. Theo is a seducer but a loser. They love music. But when they meet in the elevator, it's hate at first sight.

programme.title: Deep In The Wood
programme.desc: During the Krampus festival, little Tommi disappears mysteriously in the woods. He is found 5 years later in a building site on the outskirts of Naples, but his parents and the town locals are suspicious and frightened by his strange behaviour.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Perched Forest
programme.desc: Commissioner Macéna shows Captain Kandinsky a letter from a ten-year-old boy who claims that a monster in his village forest is behind a string of disappearances. Kandinsky begins the investigation when the boy threatens to confront the culprit himself.

programme.title: Red Eagle
programme.desc: A Summit between France, England, Portugal and the Pope is to take place in Spain, under the guise of looking for a solution to the conflict between Spain and Portugal; but the ulterior motive is to attack the Kingdom of Spain.

programme.title: Sweet Squad
programme.desc: In Kalimantan Barat, teenager Rizal faces a daunting choice to become a sugar courier across the Indonesian-Malaysian border to fund his mother's medical bills. With friends Iwan and Ajung, they risk it all for a chance at saving his mother’s life.

programme.title: Europa
programme.desc: Kamal has fled Iraq to try to enter "Fortress Europe". At the Turkish-Bulgarian border, local mercenaries are ruthlessly hunting down migrants. Alone in the forest, Kamal has three days to escape.

programme.title: Fire Country S1 - EP 14

Meanwhile, when Madhan arrives to question Suseela about slapping his friend, he unexpectedly runs into Angeline as well.

programme.title: The Challenge - Dolomite Man - EP14

programme.title: The Truth About - Eric Cantona - EP20
programme.desc: Eric Cantona was a transformative footballer, but in January 1995 he confirmed his status as one of history's most volatile players. Don Bradman was the best batsman in the history of cricket.

programme.desc: Between the two giants of French football who is the best: Michel Platini or Zinedine Zidane? In the United States, Landon Donovan or Christian Pulisic?

programme.title: Football Stars - Neuer, Maldini and Alaba - EP6

programme.desc: Who is the greatest female gymnast of all time?

programme.desc: In this edition of Sportswoman, the athletes who have become models to follow.

programme.title: The Short List - Top 10 Tennis Players - EP11
programme.desc: Report on the greatest tennis players of all time.

programme.title: Invincible - Jack Niclaus - EP40
programme.desc: Jack Nicklaus has not only won more major championships than any other golfer, but he has also transformed this sport.

programme.title: The Challenge - FISE - EP15
programme.desc: In this episode, we go behind the scenes of the FISE in the BMX World Series, attempt an improbable world record in unicycle descent and visit the pistes of the Italian Alps with two mountain bike legends.

programme.title: The Truth About - The Dream Team - EP21
programme.desc: England's third goal in the World Cup final of 1966 has been one of the most controversial in the history of football. The United States assembled the greatest collection of basketball talents on the planet for the 1992 Olympic Games.

programme.title: Karen on the Rock - Tennis on the Rock - EP8
programme.desc: Karen Minier is your guide on the Rock! In this episode, meet the cream of world tennis: Novak Djokovic, Roger Federer, Maria Sharapova, Jo-Wilfried Tsona and Rafael Nadal. You will be served!

programme.title: The Truth About - Women's Tennis - EP41
programme.desc: Nothing but the truth! In this episode of The Truth About we will be talking about women's tennis: Australia dominated the courts in the 1960s and '70s! Close up on Serena Williams and the scandal of Maria Sharapova!

programme.title: Top 20 - Supernatural - EP110
programme.desc: The Top 20 is an exclusive ranking of the news or the champions who are causing a buzz on planet sport!

programme.title: The Iconic - Olympics - Winter Games - EP14
programme.desc: China's Eillen Gu became the queen of the snows at the Winter Olympics of 2022, Jamaica's bobsleigh team inspired a film, the big names of downhill skiing take it easy, while Shaun White has appropriated the snowboard half-pipe.

programme.title: Heroines - Inclusivity / Para Sports - EP4
programme.desc: The inspiring stories and exploits which punctuate the Paralympic Games have changed the perception of handicapped people.

programme.title: The Iconic - Icons Of Winter - EP61
programme.desc: They are the icons of the winter games, notably female skier Mikaela Shiffrin, ice skater Tonya Harding, Britain's Eddie the Eagle and the miraculous United States ice hockey team.

programme.title: Sports Woman - Sporting Brides - EP25
programme.desc: Laura Trott has won more medals than any British athlete, and she has won the heart of her Olympic champion colleague Jason Kenny.

programme.title: Sports Woman - Sporting Brides - EP25
programme.desc: Laura Trott has won more medals than any British athlete, and she has won the heart of her Olympic champion colleague Jason Kenny.

programme.title: The Short List - Top 10 Trilogies in Fight Sports - EP12
programme.desc: Countdown of the 10 best trilogies in the field of combat sports.

programme.title: The Challenge - Water Sports - EP25
programme.desc: In this episode on the water, we meet some lovers of the paddle, go navigating with the best and head to Indonesia for a multi-sports water competition.

programme.title: The Truth About - Wilder vs Fury - EP22
programme.desc: The first fight between Deontay Wilder and Tyson Fury was a modern classic of heavyweight boxing. In 1973, everything changed in women's tennis, and Billie Jean King led the charge.

programme.title: Dream Teams - Formula One - EP17
programme.desc: Dream Teams looks at Formula 1 to make up the best starting grid among the ten best teams from which two drivers have been chosen.

programme.title: Foul Play - Safety Last! - EP20
programme.desc: The organiser of the 1976 German GP, Ayrton Senna and Alain Prost meet in Japan and Renault puts its life in play under the spotlight.

programme.title: Flashpoint - Barty & Goolagong Cawley / Evans / Prost V Senna - EP34
programme.desc: Two stars of Australian tennis meet on their native soil, Australian cyclist Cadel Evans wins the Tour de France and the collision which started everything for Alain Prost and Ayrton Senna.

programme.title: Sport Stars Uncovered - Stephen Curry - EP10
programme.desc: In this episode, Steph Curry and her incredible 2018 championship title. Daniel Ricciardo changes team and Simone Biles tells the story of the national championships of 2018.

programme.title: Flashpoint - Michael Jordan/ Agnes Keliti/ India 1983 - EP14
programme.desc: Michael Jordan danced for the last time for the Chicago Bulls in 1998. Agnes Keleti dominated the Melbourne Olympic Games in 1956. And India stunned the world by carrying off the cricketing World Cup in 1983.

programme.title: The Iconic - Basketball - EP8
programme.desc: The hour of glory for Lebron James could be the return to the 2016 NBA finals, Steph Curry has been an NBA gamechanger, Sue Bird and Diana Taurasi form a deathly duo and Gregg Popovich is the best NBA winner of all time.

programme.title: Sports Woman - The Sky's The Limit - EP27
programme.desc: The parachutist Amy Chmelecki inspires women around the world to break records. The Dutch Olympic champions Sanne Weavers and Sharon van Rouwendal shine with a thousand lights in Rio.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Night Beat - EP114
programme.desc: Tibbs tries to be like Officer Cool, her favourite character from the TV series "Night Beat."

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Zexal - The Sparrow, Part 2 - EP8
programme.desc: The story takes place in the distant future and focuses on a boy named Yuma Tsukumo, the number one bad boy at his school. Something unexpected happens when Ryoga challenges him to a Duel as the mysterious ghost of Astral appears before them, a new legend begins.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep8 - EP8
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Baby Einstein - Baby's Favorite Places: First Words Around Town
programme.desc: As babies turn one year old, they continue to develop their communication skills. Meanwhile, with you as their guide, they also begin to explore the world beyond their front door. Baby's Favorite Places presents them with a playful introduction to 20 words for the names of familiar locations from the market, to the library, to the local park.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Consideration - EP122
programme.desc: In this episode we will understand that prudence is related to common sense and caution, to think about what you are going to say and when you can say it. Discretion is to behave in a way that does not offend anyone or reveal information. If you want to be discreet, you have to act with caution! You should think first of the consequences of your actions in order to make the best decisions.

programme.title: Mellodees - London Bridge Is Falling Down - EP6
programme.desc: Playtime gets interrupted when Dee's four-legged friend, Treble knocks down his creation. No need to get upset though, Dee and Treble rebuild the bridge while smiling and laughing together. A great display of teamwork.

programme.title: Forever-Forever
programme.desc: In late 90s Kyiv, rebellious Tonia joins a gang, seeking protection and belonging. Amidst the ruins of the post-soviet city, she finds herself tangled up in a secret love triangle and confronting her abusive past.

programme.title: Our Children
programme.desc: A doctor brings a boy to Belgium and raises him as his own. When the boy reaches manhood, he gets married and starts his own family, but he still relies on the doctor, his adoptive father. When trouble strikes his family, dependence turns into domination.

programme.title: Traces Of Sandalwood
programme.desc: Adopted and living in Spain for years, a young woman returns to Mumbai to discover her roots, accompanied by a handsome Indian guide whom she romances.

programme.title: Deep In The Wood
programme.desc: During the Krampus festival, little Tommi disappears mysteriously in the woods. He is found 5 years later in a building site on the outskirts of Naples, but his parents and the town locals are suspicious and frightened by his strange behaviour.

programme.title: To My Beloved
programme.desc: Fernando is a good man who takes care of his only child, Daniel. Following the death of his wife Ana, every night Fernando recalls their love as he sorts out his beloved dead spouse’s belongings. One day he finds a VHS tape that will change everything.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Perched Forest
programme.desc: Commissioner Macéna shows Captain Kandinsky a letter from a ten-year-old boy who claims that a monster in his village forest is behind a string of disappearances. Kandinsky begins the investigation when the boy threatens to confront the culprit himself.

programme.title: Passed by Censor
programme.desc: In an Istanbul prison, Zakir is tasked with reading and censoring the letters inmates receive. Tasked with a writing assignment for his night class, Zakir uses a photograph of an inmate's wife for inspiration, but fantasy soon morphs into delusion.

programme.title: Red Eagle
programme.desc: A Summit between France, England, Portugal and the Pope is to take place in Spain, under the guise of looking for a solution to the conflict between Spain and Portugal; but the ulterior motive is to attack the Kingdom of Spain.

programme.title: The Vanishing Soldier
programme.desc: An 18-year-old Israeli soldier flees the Gaza battlefield and heads back to his girlfriend in Tel Aviv only to discover that the military elite is convinced he was kidnapped in the fog of war.

programme.title: Europa
programme.desc: Kamal has fled Iraq to try to enter "Fortress Europe". At the Turkish-Bulgarian border, local mercenaries are ruthlessly hunting down migrants. Alone in the forest, Kamal has three days to escape.

programme.title: Hard Shell, Soft Shell
programme.desc: Loved-up oyster farmer Az thinks he’s made it. But when an elaborate proposal goes awry and his girlfriend Jess breaks his heart, Az is forced to confront his understanding of what happiness really looks like – both hers and his own.

programme.title: You Are Not Alone
programme.desc: When Eva returns to her house on the day of her divorce, she finds a bouquet of red roses outside the door. Attached is the note: "You are not alone." The sender is anonymous.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Temptation of Evil
programme.desc: Captain Kandinsky is called upon to investigate the death of a dentist whose body was found charred. Kandinsky doubts the official verdict of suicide when he discovers two other victims whose bodies were also found charred in the same region.

programme.title: Breathing Underwater
programme.desc: When Emma has to leave her picture-perfect life for a women's shelter, covered in bruises and unexpectedly pregnant, her unlikely friendship with a ragtag group of women pushes them all into a fight to take back their power.
